name: gate-package-mismatch
description: The contract references `useLeafletMap` under `@acme/maps`, but the app registers an export of that exact name only under `@ggui-samples/leaflet`. The export NAME resolves — so this is not a typo or a hallucinated capability — but the (package, export) identity pair does not. The gate MUST reject with code `gadget_package_mismatch`: the lower-priority category, which fires only when no `gadget_not_registered` miss outranks it on the same push.
